canonical_definition: An in-the-wild multimodal benchmark for symbolic music reasoning and analysis, consisting of real music scores paired with user-generated multiple-choice questions from online forums.
papers: Prototypical Human-AICollaboration Behaviors fromLLM-Assisted Writing in the Wild
